# Jia Wei Ng — jiaweing.com

> Jia Wei Ng (Jay) is a Singapore-based software engineer, founder, and designer.
> CEO at amajor.ai (AI agents). Co-founder of Ryu (local-first AI assistant, launching May 2026).
> Creator of titan.tf — 460k+ unique players, 10k MAU. Google APAC Solution Challenge 2025 Top 1 Singapore.
> 2x Dell Cloud Native Awards winner (1st place). Building in public.

## Identity
- Full name: Jia Wei Ng
- Also known as: Jay
- Location: Singapore
- Current role: CEO, amajor.ai
- Education: BSc Computing Science, University of Glasgow / Singapore Institute of Technology

## Achievements
- Google APAC Solution Challenge 2025: Top 10 APAC, Top 1 Singapore (3,300+ entrants)
- Dell Innovatefest 2025: Finalist, featured in Business Times
- Dell Cloud Native Award: 1st place (Professional Software Development + Cloud Computing)
- GovTech × OpenAI Hackathon 2024: Top 10%, 25/250

## Current Ventures
- amajor.ai — AI agent products company: https://amajor.ai
- Ryu — local-first consumer AI assistant (May 2026): https://ryuhq.com
- supply.tf — limited-edition streetwear: https://supply.tf
- Update Night — weekly tech podcast (2+ years): https://updatenight.com

## Selected Projects
- titan.tf: 460k+ unique players, 10k MAU, 20k+ Steam community members
- DropDrawer: 180+ GitHub stars
- Unsplash: 460k+ views, 4.3k downloads, top 25% contributor
